case_title: MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP vs. RUTKOWSKI, SASHA TONY et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUTKOWSKI, SASHA TONY PALERMO, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 595 JOHN MUIR DRIVE #C408, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION ON ORIGINAL LEASE PERFORMED PER CRC 522

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUIR PARTNERS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SERVED JAN-25-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUTKOWSKI, SASHA TONY PALERMO, RICHARD
